commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=52106133b493764db3aac8c99290bfb02b80c6b3)
commands.review_summary:
The branch removes the `abortedLastRun` stale-run exemption during registry restore, adds stale-run finalization to subagent orphan recovery, updates subagent docs, and changes persistence coverage.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests -9, Docs 0. Total +9 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main exempts `abortedLastRun` from stale restore pruning and orphan recovery reaches resume logic without a stale liveness gate. I did not run a live gateway restart in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and contributor follow-up remain needed because the PR changes session-state recovery semantics, has a narrow finalization-accounting defect, and still needs real restart/orphan-recovery proof.

target.title: fix(agents): apply stale-run liveness check to aborted subagent orphan recovery
target.author: huangting-xy
